zh.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol是Henry de Baliol的女兒，於1220年出生在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。她與Gilbert de Gaunt結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol是Henry de Baliol的女儿，于1220年出生在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆。她与Gilbert de Gaunt结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol was born in 1220, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England as the daughter of Henry de Baliol. She married Gilbert de Gaunt. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1309, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol est née en 1220, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, fille de Henry de Baliol. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Gaunt. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1309, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol wurde 1220 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, als Tochter von Henry de Baliol geboren. Sie hat Gilbert de Gaunt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1309 im Alter von 89 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol è nata il nel 1220 nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England come figlia di Henry de Baliol. Lei sposato Gilbert de Gaunt. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1309, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliolは1220年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムでHenry de Baliolの娘として生まれた。Gilbert de Gauntと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年に89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol(은)는 1220년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 Henry de Baliol의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Gilbert de Gaunt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol nasceu em 1220, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra filha de Henry de Baliol. Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Gaunt. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1309, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol родилась в 1220 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия. Её отца звали Henry de Baliol. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Gaunt. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1309 г. в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lora de Baliol nació en 1220, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra como hija de Henry de Baliol. Se casó con Gilbert de Gaunt. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1309, a la edad de 89 años.
